scope: local deterministic implementation and proof machinery only; no v9 empirical source population is claimed

obligations.claim: capture executes the frozen finite query program
every accepted response retains exact sidecar and body bytes
terminal occurrences quotient to one node-ID population unit
capture retries and invalidations preserve total custody
classification batches, retries, and phase barriers are deterministic
raw model bytes bind exact decisions and reasons
registered forcing repositories bind exact node-ID pair records under the frozen authentication-policy reference
commit and repository document custody precede every review attempt
out-of-domain frame members retain custody without becoming candidates
forcing out-of-domain is terminal including frame overlap
runner output freezes unchanged as a v3 population
shared content blobs preserve distinct repository evidence identities
every primary classification binds an exact raw-byte descriptor whose entity kind is SourceSystem, SourceOrganization, NativePlatform, or BehaviorHarness
entity-kind identifiers are normalized, nullable, mutually exclusive, and constrained by kind-specific non-null invariants
every descriptor has a nonempty normalized structural stratum and every forcing member including adoption overlap joins the registered forcing stratum
candidate descriptors are exact copies of the verified primary descriptor
candidate license is derived exactly from canonical replay metadata and is null for forcing members without replay metadata

externalDeferred.requirement: execute two complete GitHub provider-query passes before cutoff
externalDeferred.requires: real GitHub service and elapsed provider observations

externalDeferred.requirement: classify the frozen frame with primary independent and adjudicator authorities
externalDeferred.requires: authenticated distinct reviewer authorities and real provider observations for every required review role

externalDeferred.requirement: resolve and capture exact repository commits and documents for every classified member
authenticate the authority that binds every registered forcing repository to its provider node ID
externalDeferred.requires: an external forcing-identity authority and authenticated mapping observation

prohibitedClaims: v9 empirical source population is complete
U1 semantic population gate is externally validated
universality denominators are frozen from live v9 results

skepticalReview.capture: accepted after exact replay, retry, cutoff, adapter, and invalidation-custody repairs
skepticalReview.population: accepted after registered forcing joins, semantic model bytes, causal evidence, batching, retries, and forcing-overlap repairs
skepticalReview.runner: accepted after unchanged runner-output-to-v3 verification and shared evidence derivation

allowed: U2 interface and fixture development that declares its population input synthetic
U2 property tests whose denominators are fixture-local
forbidden: registration of a U2 empirical corpus
publication or reuse of downstream empirical denominators
treating this implementation closure as a completed U1 population gate
downstreamBoundary.releaseCondition: a separately verified external U1 source-population.v3 digest produced after all external U1 obligations are discharged
